steps.title: Match the plural antecedent
steps.content: The possessive pronoun refers to both Heinrich Böll and Camilo José Cela. Because the antecedent is plural, the pronoun before "contributions" must also be plural and possessive.

steps.title: Use a possessive pronoun
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D are contractions, not possessive pronouns. Choice C is singular and disagrees with the two writers. The plural possessive pronoun matches the plural antecedent and fits before "contributions." The answer is B.
